text: Region: Saida Coastal Basin. Date: 2026-05-23. Predicted flood risk: Medium. Risk score: 0.92. Main drivers: lower weekly rainfall; low elevation; low slope. 7-day rainfall is 32.27 mm, humidity is 73.33%, elevation mean is 24 m, slope mean is 2.0. Recommended action: Monitor low-lying roads and keep drainage crews on standby.
